name: Chicken Gorky
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup Sour cream or plain yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chicken in butter with the chopped onions.
2. Pour heated vodka over the chicken and onions.
3. Add garlic, salt, pepper, and parsley to the pan.
4. Remove the chicken from the pan and dredge it in flour.
5. Add tomato paste and chicken broth to the pan.
6. Stir in sour cream and feta cheese.
7. Bring mixture to a boil, stirring constantly.
8. Return the chicken to the mixture.
9. Reduce heat and simmer for 20-30 minutes.
10. Arrange the chicken in a deep casserole dish.
11. Pour remaining mixture over the chicken.
12. Cook in a preheated 350 degree F (175 C) oven for 20 minutes, or until brown on top.
